name: MRI Stack Compression and Formatting
description: You need to create a lightweight 'web preview' version of a large MRI scan for email sharing. Open the 'T1 Head' sample image and process it by converting it to 8-bit grayscale, scaling the spatial dimensions to 75% of the original size, and subsampling the stack to keep only every 3rd slice. Save the resulting processed stack as a TIFF file to ~/ImageJ_Data/processed/mri_preview.tif.
